title: from_uri path-checks precede token check — test guards are wrong
description: from_uri_missing_mount_slash and from_uri_empty_secret_path both guard with 'if VAULT_TOKEN is absent, return'. But in from_uri, the path validation (find('/') returns None → InvalidUri) happens at line ~110, before the token retrieval at line ~128. So both tests would pass correctly without a token. The guards cause them to skip vacuously in environments without VAULT_TOKEN, giving false confidence. The comment 'VAULT_TOKEN absence would return Unavailable before reaching this check' is factually wrong.
